description: The chart only displays data for two months (January and February 2025), yet the title suggests it covers the full year 2025, implying a complete annual trend. With just two data points, the apparent upward or downward slope between regions is misleading — it could represent a seasonal dip, a one-time anomaly, or random noise rather than any meaningful trend. A reader would have no way of knowing the dramatic fluctuations that occur across the remaining ten months of the year.
